title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 02 2025
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 02 2025
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 02 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 02/01/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures opened lower but closed higher, fluctuating upward throughout the day. The most-traded contract I2505 finallysettled at 782 yuan/mt, rising slightly by 0.64% for the day. Traders showed moderate willingness to sell, while some steel mills purchased as needed.
